data.title: Jack Dorsey The Mysterious Satoshi Nakamoto? VanEck's Matthew Sigel Points To 'Key' Evidence Linking Twitter Founder To The Bitcoin Creator
data.description: Matthew Sigel, VanEck’s Head of Digital Assets Research, added a fresh twist to the Satoshi Nakamoto mystery saga on Tuesday, claiming that tech mogul Jack Dorsey is the elusive Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) creator.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Slide As Stocks Rally: Analyst Spots 'Good Sign' For ETH's Mid-Term And Long-Term Price Outlooks
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies dipped on Tuesday, even as the stock market lifted to record highs.

data.title: Apple's Leaked Renders Show iPhone 17 Air And Pro Getting Unique Camera Islands —But Base Model's Looks May Disappoint Some
data.description: Leaked renders suggest Apple's iPhone 17 Air and Pro will feature unique camera island designs, while the standard iPhone 17 may retain the iPhone 16's look, disappointing fans hoping for a visual refresh.

data.title: Carvana Q4 Earnings Preview: Improving Profitability, Growing Revenue, EV Sales Top Items To Watch
data.description: Carvana stock is up over 400% in the last year. A look at key items for investors to watch in fourth-quarter financial results Wednesday.

data.title: Palantir, Intel, Arista, Occidental, And Tesla: Why Are These 5 Stocks On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: Major U.S. indices closed higher on Tuesday, with the Nasdaq gaining 0.07% to 20,041.26.
